document_id: 6.人工知能関連技術の研究開発及び活用の推進に関する法律.html
category:
Category: Trade

Explanation: This appears to be Japan's AI Technology Development and Utilization Promotion Act, which focuses on promoting AI technology research, development and commercial applications. While it touches on multiple aspects, its primary aim is to enhance Japan's technological competitiveness and facilitate AI industry development and trade.

extracted_info.title: AI Technology Development and Utilization Promotion Act
extracted_info.scope: Research, development and utilization of AI-related technologies in Japan
key_requirements: Ensuring transparency in AI development and utilization
Protection against misuse of AI technology

key_requirement_details.requirement: Creation and implementation of AI Basic Plan
key_requirement_details.compliance_action: Government must establish and publish comprehensive AI development plan
Development of guidelines aligned with international norms

phased_milestones: Implementation of AI Strategy Headquarters within 3 months

notes: Law emphasizes balance between promotion and appropriate use of AI technology
Focus on international cooperation and leadership in AI development
Requires interdisciplinary approach to AI research and development

filename: 6.人工知能関連技術の研究開発及び活用の推進に関する法律.html
